arts.ttl: Predicted Bayern Munich XI vs Bayer Leverkusen: In-form Serge Gnabry to start
arts.sum: Bayern Munich host Bundesliga champions Bayer Leverkusen in today’s Topspiel with the Vincent Kompany looking to keep his 100 percent record as Bayern head coach. Although Hiroki Ito has returned…

arts.ttl: Harry Kane loving Bayern Munich partnership with Michael Olise
arts.sum: The 22-year-old, whom the Bavarians plucked out of English Premier League side Crystal Palace, is off to an electric start in Germany — flashing both goal-scoring and assisting abilities coming in from the left flank. It has certainly caught the eye of fellow former Premier League stalwart Harry Kane, who linked up twice with Olise — supplying and receiving an assist — in last Saturday’s demolition of SV Werder Bremen.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl says Bundesliga has gotten more exciting with increased competition
arts.sum: We have competitors like Leverkusen, Dortmund and Leipzig, who have always reached the Champions League in recent years. Bayern Munich ’s stranglehold on the league trophy may have been snapped after 11 straight years, but that won’t mean they will let it stay that way.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Gamethread and Live Blog
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have always been THE team to beat in German football, a reputation earned courtesy of a long history of silverware at the very top level of professional football. Coming off a week where twenty goals were scored, people expect big things from this Bayern Munich side.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Thomas Müller analyzes looming clash of titans against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: When asked whether Leverkusen's recent success and Bayern's failure last season would act as additional motivation, Müller replied affirmatively. Internationally, Bayern have been the biggest German team for many years, yet Leverkusen were able to topple us [last season].

arts.ttl: Bayern are flying high under Vincent Kompany - but the real tests are just about to start
arts.sum: The managerial merry-go-round that engulfs all of Europe’s top leagues often means that very little can surprise modern football fans, but even the most well-versed even struggled not to...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany expecting a multi-way battle between the Bundesliga’s top dogs
arts.sum: Despite Leverkusen’s historic season, Bayern still hold the record for most points in a single league season (91 in 2012/13). I think we have to prepare ourselves for another 90-plus point season from the competition.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: More on Bayern Munich’s rumored summer pursuit of Florian Wirtz; Mykhailo Mudryk seeking to bolt Chelsea?; Manchester City to “do everything” to get Jamal Musiala?; Arsenal might be gaining ground with Dušan Vlahović; and MORE!
arts.sum: Premier League champions Manchester City are reportedly ready to “do everything” to beat Real Madrid to 21-year-old Bayern Munich whizkid Jamal Musiala. Bayern Munich are keen on bringing Bayer Leverkusen talent Florian Wirtz to the Allianz Arena next summer but the German giants will face strong competition from Man City and Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss hails head coach Vincent Kompany’s communication skills, football vision
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sure feels like it got its man in the end. From a human perspective, he knows how to deal with the players, how to accurately communicate his ideas — active football, aggressive pressing, a lot of man to man and taking risks.
